svg.title: DYAD UCX DTL data transfer sequence
svg.desc: Shows the UCX backend sequence: consumer packs its pre-registered buffer address and remote key into the Flux RPC, producer unpacks and performs an RDMA push directly into consumer memory via ucp_put_nbx, consumer polls buffer sentinel to detect data arrival.
svg.text: Pre-registered RDMA buffer allocated once at init. Producer pushes directly into consumer memory.
Endpoint cached across transfers. return_buffer() is a no-op — buffer freed only at finalization.
